corrections.note: Missing space after marginal line number before τὸ.
Missing space after marginal line number before Ἐν-.
The leading mark is a superscript numeral/footnote sign, not capital iota; transcript misread it as Ἱ.
Transcript dropped the witness and separator after συγχωρητεον and incorrectly merged the next lemma number 32 into the variant. Printed text shows συγχωρητεον V* | εξωμεθα Vᵃ.
Printed apparatus has ετι V, not επι V.

corrections.location: line 4, variant after om περι A
corrections.note: The parenthetical witness is ℵ, not V.
First form is θρασαιου, not θαρραιου.

corrections.current:
συντελειτο
την ποριαν (φεραι, Vᵃ) ο Ηλιοδ. V
corrections.correct: συντελειτο την ποριαν (-φεραι, Vᵃ) ο Ηλιοδ. V
corrections.note: Parenthetical note is minus φεραι, not standalone φεραι; line break also split the entry.

notes: Running head and page number match. Body text is otherwise correct; left-margin numbers 31, 32 are line indicators, not verse numbers, but only spacing around them is wrong in the transcript. Apparatus contains several definite misreadings, including one siglum ℵ misread as V.
